Allosteric Site
Introduction of orthosteric-allosteric site subset

    Allostery is defined as the regulation of protein function, structure, and/or flexibility induced by the binding of a ligand at a site topographically distinct from the orthosteric site and such site is then defined as an allosteric site.

Allosteric Site
Introduction of orthosteric-allosteric site subset

    Allostery is defined as the regulation of protein function, structure, and/or flexibility induced by the binding of a ligand at a site topographically distinct from the orthosteric site and such site is then defined as an allosteric site.

Allosteric Site
Introduction of orthosteric-allosteric site subset

    Allostery is defined as the regulation of protein function, structure, and/or flexibility induced by the binding of a ligand at a site topographically distinct from the orthosteric site and such site is then defined as an allosteric site.
